# Ranjan Sharma

> Ranjan Sharma (Konsept / konseptt) is a USA-based cybersecurity and software engineer. Portfolio: https://ranjansharma.info.np/

I code a bit of everything. Recent work is mostly Rust and TypeScript: compilers, research tools, and small web apps. 55+ public repos on GitHub.

## Profiles
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/konseptt/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/konseptt)

## Latest projects
- [Synapse Research](https://github.com/Konseptt/synapse-research): PubMed search with evidence overviews and synthesis.
- [Faculty Ledger](https://github.com/Konseptt/faculty-ledger): Compare professors using Rate My Professors data.
- [LyangLang](https://github.com/Konseptt/LyangLang): Nepali-syntax programming language and compiler in Rust.
- [Clinical Trial Matcher](https://github.com/Konseptt/clinical-trial-matcher): Search trial registries from patient clinical details.
- [Interview Question Predictor](https://github.com/Konseptt/interview-question-predictor): Job description in, 15 likely interview questions out.
- [brainrender-napari](https://github.com/Konseptt/brainrender-napari): napari plugin for BrainGlobe atlases.
- [Rust Autonomous Vehicle Simulation](https://github.com/Konseptt/Rust-Autonomous-Vehicle-Simulation): Self-driving cars with genetic-algorithm-trained nets (Rust, Bevy). Demo: https://youtu.be/BzCkSsQmezE
- [HashPass](https://hashpass.ranjansharma.info.np/): Password hashing web app.
- [Code to Image](https://codetoimage.ranjansharma.info.np/): Code snippets as shareable images.
- [3D SHM Visualization](https://shm.ranjansharma.info.np/): Simple Harmonic Motion in 3D (p5.js / WebGL).
- [Streamline](https://youtube.ranjansharma.info.np/): Minimal YouTube clone (React, Material UI).

## Skills
Cybersecurity, pen testing, web security, Rust, systems programming, compilers, Python, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Java, C++, MongoDB, MySQL, Django, REST APIs, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS.
